MaxLineLength:CollectablesApi.kt:CollectablesApi$@Parameter(description = "Locale for CardMarket results (e.g., de, en, fr, es)", schema = Schema(allowableValues = ["de", "en", "fr", "es", "it", "pt", "pl", "ru"], defaultValue = "de")) @Valid @RequestParam(value = "locale", required = false, defaultValue = "de") locale: LocaleSchema

MaxLineLength:CollectablesApi.kt:CollectablesApi$@Parameter(description = "Product type filter (e.g., Singles, Boosters, Boxes)", schema = Schema(allowableValues = ["Singles", "Boosters", "Booster-Boxes"], defaultValue = "Singles")) @Valid @RequestParam(value = "type", required = false, defaultValue = "Singles") type: ProductTypeSchema

If omitted, the service will try to resolve it from the stored product data.", schema = Schema(defaultValue = "")) @Valid @RequestParam(value = "setname", required = false, defaultValue = "") setname: kotlin.String
